flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rio Salado College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rio Salado College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rio Salado College rose 205% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 11.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rio Salado College rose 118% between 2023 and 2024 (3.9% → 8.5%).
